title: nassella major
intro: Nassella major, also known as squirrel tail grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Nassella major include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome and arthritis. Nassella major can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal capsules and salves, making it a versatile addition to a natural health regimen.
